reviewer_value: Shows hourly grain, complete panel, duplicate/missing-hour checks.
caveat: Timestamps are parsed as timezone-naive in this version.

reviewer_value: Raw trips are transformed into hourly and daily demand measures.
caveat: Only trip starts are modeled, not inventory or completions.

reviewer_value: Weekday, weekend, hour-of-day, and holiday flags support interpretable seasonality.
caveat: Holiday list is hand-scoped to January 2024.

reviewer_value: Weekday/hour profile demonstrates commute and weekend patterns.
caveat: One winter month cannot prove stable annual seasonality.

reviewer_value: Rolling trend columns separate level from hourly volatility.
caveat: This is a descriptive proxy, not formal STL decomposition.

reviewer_value: Lag correlations expose short-memory, daily, and weekly repetition.
caveat: ACF is descriptive and should be retested on more months.

reviewer_value: Candidate lags and rolling means are ranked before heavier modeling.
caveat: Correlation does not imply out-of-sample lift.

reviewer_value: Weather fields are joined at hourly grain and evaluated descriptively.
caveat: Weather is one NYC coordinate, not station-level microclimate.

reviewer_value: Previous-day, previous-week, and calendar-profile baselines establish benchmarks.
caveat: Current main report uses a single Jan. 25-31 holdout.

reviewer_value: Daily rolling 24-hour origins demonstrate stronger forecast evaluation practice.
caveat: January-only method layer; see multi_month_proof.html for full-year validation.

reviewer_value: MAE, RMSE, MAPE, and mean actuals are reported for transparent model comparison.
caveat: MAPE can overemphasize low-volume overnight hours.

reviewer_value: Seasonal residuals identify hours worth investigating.
caveat: External events, outages, and operations context are needed for root cause.

reviewer_value: Station rankings show how to evolve from aggregate demand to station-cluster panels.
caveat: Station IDs and metadata are required before longitudinal station forecasts.

reviewer_value: Model card, caveats, and publishing checklist make limitations visible.
caveat: Production claims require more history and stronger validation.
